response: This medium-difficulty Pad Thai recipe, a staple of Thai cuisine, requires just 15 minutes of prep time and 10 minutes of cook time to create 4 full servings of the beloved stir-fry dish. Every serving of this homemade Pad Thai clocks in at 380 calories, with a balanced nutritional breakdown of 22 grams of protein, 45 grams of carbohydrates, and 12 grams of fat, making it a quick, flavorful, reasonably portioned option for weeknight dinners or small casual gatherings.
